title: Vivekachudamani: The Crest-Jewel of Discrimination
description: Shankara's definitive statement of Advaita Vedanta: Brahman alone is real, the world is appearance, the self is Brahman.
introduction: Shankara's definitive statement of Advaita Vedanta: Brahman alone is real, the world is appearance, the self is Brahman.

translation.original_text: brahma satyaṃ jagan mithyā jīvo brahmaiva nāparaḥ
translation.text: Brahman is real. The world is appearance. The individual self is Brahman alone, nothing else.
